prompt: Fix the stack overflow on deep recursive tree traversal

turns.content:
<task>

arguments.reasoning: depth_first() is recursive and will overflow on deep trees. Need to convert to iterative using an explicit stack. Process nodes in reverse order of children to maintain DFS order.

arguments.summary: Converted recursive depth_first() in src/data/tree.rs to iterative using explicit Vec stack. Pushes children in reverse order for correct DFS ordering. No stack overflow on deep trees. All 3 tests pass including test_deep_tree.
arguments.final_answer: Converted recursive DFS to iterative in src/data/tree.rs using explicit stack. Eliminates stack overflow on deep trees. All 3 tests pass.
